Author: AEBus
Name: FFXIV Venues Directory
Punchline: Browse FFXIV roleplay venues in-game with rich filters and schedules.
Description: Discover open FFXIV venues by region, data center, world, tags, and schedule. View detailed venue cards with addresses, banners, and external links directly in-game.
Changelog:
This update makes venue browsing easier and cleaner in everyday use.

- Refined the browser layout for a more readable list and detail view.
- Improved filters and sorting so it is faster to find the venue you want.
- Better address and action handling for copying details or opening venue links.
- Schedule display is clearer and easier to follow in your local timezone.
- General polish across banners, descriptions, and venue details.
